_meta.purpose: Symbols present in the concept registry that must be EXCLUDED when clustering / aggregating by concept. These are not single operating companies (ETFs) or are non-US instruments whose FMP profile is empty, so their LLM concept tags are unreliable. Rows are KEPT in company_concept_tags; downstream concept-clustering consumers filter against this set.

excluded.reason: 港股恒生科技指数 ETF（LLM business_role 自述为追踪恒生科技指数的 ETF），非单一公司。
港股 5 位数字代码，FMP profile 全空、业务无法判定，LLM 分类为占位推测，不可信。
Boss 标记为 ETF；FMP profile 空，LLM 仅凭 ticker 字符串误判为 DRAM 存储芯片制造商。
